nodes.text:
Symptoms include altered bowel habit, abdominal discomfort, reduced appetite and abdominal bloating for 9 weeks. Additional symptoms include back pain.

Imaging:
CT abdomen on 23/07/2024: mural thickening at descending colon, inflammatory vs neoplastic.
